channel.title: What Happens If You Get a DUI in California?
channel.description: What actually happens if you get a DUI in California — court process, DMV deadlines, fines, license suspension, and how to avoid the worst outcomes.

item.title: What Happens After a California DUI Arrest
item.description: A clear breakdown of what to expect after a DUI arrest in California — criminal court, DMV action, and first-offense penalties.
